labels.label: AUDIO.ATTACK
labels.summary: Attack nibble for AUDIO.INSTRUMENT_SET.

labels.label: AUDIO.DECAY
labels.summary: Decay nibble for AUDIO.INSTRUMENT_SET.

labels.label: AUDIO.DURATION
labels.summary: Duration in 60 Hz frames for AUDIO.SOUND.

labels.label: AUDIO.INSTRUMENT
labels.summary: Instrument slot for AUDIO.SOUND.

labels.label: AUDIO.INSTRUMENT_SET
labels.summary: Define an instrument envelope and waveform.

labels.label: AUDIO.INST_ID
labels.summary: Instrument slot to define for AUDIO.INSTRUMENT_SET.

labels.label: AUDIO.MIDPLAY
labels.summary: Play the MIDI file named by FIO.NAME/FIO.NAMELEN.

labels.label: AUDIO.MIDSTOP
labels.summary: Stop MIDI file playback.

labels.label: AUDIO.MUSIC_LOOP
labels.summary: Enable or disable music looping. AUDIO.NOTE is 0=off, nonzero=on.

labels.label: AUDIO.MUSIC_NOTE

outputs.name: A
outputs.description: Current MIDI note, or 0 if out of range or silent

labels.summary: Return the current MIDI note for a music voice.

labels.label: AUDIO.MUSIC_PLAY
labels.summary: Start queued music playback.

labels.label: AUDIO.MUSIC_PLAYING
labels.summary: Return nonzero if music is playing.

labels.label: AUDIO.MUSIC_PRIORITY
labels.summary: Set voice-stealing priority from AUDIO.NOTE and following pseudo-register bytes.

labels.label: AUDIO.MUSIC_SEQUENCE
labels.summary: Queue an MML sequence for AUDIO.VOICE using AUDIO.STRL/H and AUDIO.STRLEN.

labels.label: AUDIO.MUSIC_STOP
labels.summary: Stop music playback.

labels.label: AUDIO.MUSIC_TEMPO
labels.summary: Set music tempo from AUDIO.NOTE/AUDIO.DURATION as a 16-bit BPM value.

labels.label: AUDIO.NOTE
labels.summary: MIDI note for AUDIO.SOUND.

labels.label: AUDIO.PLAY_SOUND
labels.summary: Play a one-shot note using A/X/Y register arguments.

labels.label: AUDIO.RELEASE
labels.summary: Release nibble for AUDIO.INSTRUMENT_SET.

labels.label: AUDIO.SET_VOLUME
labels.summary: Set master or per-voice volume using A/X register arguments.

labels.label: AUDIO.SFLOAD
labels.summary: Load the soundfont named by FIO.NAME/FIO.NAMELEN.

labels.label: AUDIO.SFX_PLAYING
labels.summary: Return nonzero if a sound effect is playing.

labels.label: AUDIO.SIDPLAY
labels.summary: Play the SID file named by FIO.NAME/FIO.NAMELEN. AUDIO.NOTE is reused as the 1-based song number.

labels.label: AUDIO.SIDSTOP
labels.summary: Stop SID file playback.

labels.label: AUDIO.SOUND
labels.summary: Play a one-shot note from AUDIO.NOTE, AUDIO.DURATION, and AUDIO.INSTRUMENT.

labels.label: AUDIO.STATUS
labels.summary: Return raw music status bits.

labels.label: AUDIO.STRH
labels.summary: High byte of MML string pointer for AUDIO.MUSIC_SEQUENCE.

labels.label: AUDIO.STRL
labels.summary: Low byte of MML string pointer for AUDIO.MUSIC_SEQUENCE.

labels.label: AUDIO.STRLEN
labels.summary: MML string length for AUDIO.MUSIC_SEQUENCE.

labels.label: AUDIO.SUSTAIN
labels.summary: Sustain nibble for AUDIO.INSTRUMENT_SET.

labels.label: AUDIO.VOICE
labels.summary: Voice selector. Use 0 for master volume or 1..14 for music voices.

labels.label: AUDIO.VOLUME
labels.summary: Set volume from AUDIO.VOLUME_LEVEL and AUDIO.VOICE.

labels.label: AUDIO.VOLUME_LEVEL
labels.summary: Volume level for AUDIO.VOLUME.

labels.label: AUDIO.WAVEFORM
labels.summary: SID waveform/control byte for AUDIO.INSTRUMENT_SET.

labels.label: BLITTER.COPY
labels.summary: Start a rectangular blitter copy using the BLT controller registers.

labels.label: BLITTER.FILL
labels.summary: Start a rectangular blitter fill using destination, size, stride, and fill registers.

labels.label: BLITTER.START_COPY
labels.summary: Low-level blitter copy start. Call BLITTER.COPY for the public wrapper.

labels.label: BLITTER.START_FILL
labels.summary: Low-level blitter fill start. Call BLITTER.FILL for the public wrapper.

labels.label: BLITTER.WAIT
labels.summary: Wait for the blitter controller to leave BUSY and return shared status.

labels.label: COPPER.ADD
labels.summary: Add a copper operation using VGC.P0..VGC.P5.

labels.label: COPPER.CLEAR
labels.summary: Clear the active copper list.

labels.label: COPPER.COMMAND
labels.summary: Issue a raw copper VGC command.

labels.label: COPPER.LIST
labels.summary: Select a copper list using VGC.P0.

labels.label: COPPER.LIST_END
labels.summary: Finish the current copper list.

labels.label: COPPER.OFF
labels.summary: Disable copper execution.

labels.label: COPPER.ON
labels.summary: Enable copper execution.

labels.label: COPPER.SET_REG_INDEX
labels.summary: Set VGC.P3/P4 to a direct VGC register index.

labels.label: COPPER.SET_SPRITE_REG
labels.summary: Set VGC.P3/P4 to a sprite attribute register address.

labels.label: COPPER.USE
labels.summary: Activate a copper list using VGC.P0.

labels.label: DMA.COPY
labels.summary: Start a DMA copy using the DMA controller registers.

labels.label: DMA.FILL
labels.summary: Start a DMA fill using the destination and length registers.

labels.label: DMA.START_COPY
labels.summary: Low-level DMA copy start. Call DMA.COPY for the stable public wrapper.

labels.label: DMA.START_FILL
labels.summary: Low-level DMA fill start. Call DMA.FILL for the stable public wrapper.

labels.label: DMA.WAIT
labels.summary: Wait for the DMA controller to leave BUSY and return shared status.

labels.label: FIO.ARG_ADDRH
labels.summary: High byte of XRAM address argument for FIO.PREPARE_XRAM_TRANSFER.

labels.label: FIO.ARG_ADDRL
labels.summary: Low byte of XRAM address argument for FIO.PREPARE_XRAM_TRANSFER.

labels.label: FIO.ARG_ADDRM
labels.summary: Middle byte of XRAM address argument for FIO.PREPARE_XRAM_TRANSFER.

labels.label: FIO.ARG_LENH
labels.summary: High byte of transfer length for FIO.PREPARE_XRAM_TRANSFER.

labels.label: FIO.ARG_LENL
labels.summary: Low byte of transfer length for FIO.PREPARE_XRAM_TRANSFER.

labels.label: FIO.ARG_NAMELEN
labels.summary: Filename length for FIO.COPY_NAME.

labels.label: FIO.ARG_NAMEPTR_H
labels.summary: High byte of filename pointer for FIO.COPY_NAME.

labels.label: FIO.ARG_NAMEPTR_L
labels.summary: Low byte of filename pointer for FIO.COPY_NAME.

labels.label: FIO.CD
labels.summary: Change directory to FIO.NAME/FIO.NAMELEN.

labels.label: FIO.CHECK
labels.summary: Convert the current FIO status register to the shared A=0/1 result.

labels.label: FIO.CLEAR_ERROR
labels.summary: Clear the host-visible FIO status and error latch.

labels.label: FIO.CMD_LOADRUNTIME
labels.summary: Host command that streams a 16K file into the primary runtime ROM bank. Callers must execute from RAM while issuing it.

labels.label: FIO.COPY_NAME
labels.summary: Copy a pointer-based filename into FIO.NAME/FIO.NAMELEN.

labels.label: FIO.DELETE
labels.summary: Delete the file named by FIO.NAME/FIO.NAMELEN.

labels.label: FIO.DIR_OPEN
labels.summary: Open a directory listing using optional FIO.NAME/FIO.NAMELEN filter.

labels.label: FIO.DIR_READ
labels.summary: Read the next directory entry into the FIO directory result registers.

labels.label: FIO.EXEC
labels.summary: Issue an FIO command, wait for completion, and return A=0/1 status.

labels.label: FIO.GLOAD
labels.summary: Load VGC/graphics memory using FIO graphics registers.

labels.label: FIO.GSAVE
labels.summary: Save VGC/graphics memory using FIO graphics registers.

labels.label: FIO.ISSUE
labels.summary: Issue a raw FIO command without waiting for completion.

labels.label: FIO.LOAD
labels.summary: Load a BASIC or binary file using FIO.NAME and FIO_SRCL/H.

labels.label: FIO.LOAD_RUNTIME
labels.summary: Load a 16K runtime ROM image named by FIO.NAME/FIO.NAMELEN into the primary runtime ROM bank.

labels.label: FIO.MKDIR
labels.summary: Create the directory named by FIO.NAME/FIO.NAMELEN.

labels.label: FIO.NAME
labels.summary: Filename buffer used by file-backed runtime routines.

labels.label: FIO.NAMELEN
labels.summary: Length of the filename in FIO.NAME, 1..63 bytes.

labels.label: FIO.PREPARE_XRAM_TRANSFER
labels.summary: Copy pointer filename and XRAM transfer arguments into FIO registers.

labels.label: FIO.PWD
labels.summary: Read the current directory into FIO.NAME/FIO.NAMELEN.

labels.label: FIO.RMDIR
labels.summary: Remove the directory named by FIO.NAME/FIO_NAMELEN.

labels.label: FIO.RUN
labels.summary: Compatibility alias for FIO.EXEC.

labels.label: FIO.SAVE
labels.summary: Save RAM using FIO.NAME plus FIO_SRCL/H and FIO_ENDL/H.

labels.label: FIO.SET_IO_ERROR
labels.summary: Set FIO_STATUS/FIO_ERRCODE to the shared I/O error state.

labels.label: NIC.ACCEPT
labels.summary: Accept a pending connection for NIC_SLOT.

labels.label: NIC.ARG_NAMELEN
labels.summary: Hostname length for NIC.COPY_NAME.

labels.label: NIC.ARG_NAMEPTR_H
labels.summary: High byte of hostname pointer for NIC.COPY_NAME.

labels.label: NIC.ARG_NAMEPTR_L
labels.summary: Low byte of hostname pointer for NIC.COPY_NAME.

labels.label: NIC.COMMAND
labels.summary: Issue a raw NIC command.

labels.label: NIC.CONNECT
labels.summary: Connect NIC_SLOT to NIC_NAMEBUF:NIC_RPORTL/H.

labels.label: NIC.COPY_NAME
labels.summary: Copy a pointer-based host name to NIC_NAMEBUF and append NUL.

labels.label: NIC.DISCONNECT
labels.summary: Disconnect NIC_SLOT.

labels.label: NIC.LENGTH
labels.summary: Read the most recent NIC message length.

labels.label: NIC.LISTEN
labels.summary: Listen on NIC_SLOT using NIC_LPORTL/H.

labels.label: NIC.READY
labels.summary: Return 1 when NIC_SLOT has data/accept readiness, otherwise 0.

labels.label: NIC.RECV
labels.summary: Receive data for NIC_SLOT into NIC_DMAL/H.

labels.label: NIC.SEND
labels.summary: Send NIC_DMALEN bytes from NIC_DMAL/H on NIC_SLOT.

labels.label: NIC.STATUS
labels.summary: Read clamped NIC slot status.

labels.label: ROMSWAP.PRIMARY
labels.summary: Select the primary runtime ROM bank at $C000. At cold boot this is NovaBASIC; a RAM launcher may replace it with another runtime first.

labels.label: SPRITE.BACKGROUND_STATUS
labels.summary: Read the sprite-background collision status register.

labels.label: SPRITE.COLLISION_STATUS
labels.summary: Read the sprite-sprite collision status register.

labels.label: SPRITE.COMMAND
labels.summary: Issue a raw sprite VGC command without waiting for completion.

labels.label: SPRITE.DISABLE
labels.summary: Disable the sprite in VGC.P0.

labels.label: SPRITE.ENABLE
labels.summary: Enable the sprite in VGC.P0.

labels.label: SPRITE.GET_X
labels.summary: Read a sprite's 16-bit X coordinate.

labels.label: SPRITE.GET_Y
labels.summary: Read a sprite's Y coordinate.

labels.label: SPRITE.POS
labels.summary: Move a sprite using VGC.P0=sprite, VGC.P1/P2=x, VGC.P3=y.

labels.label: SPRITE.REG_OFFSET
labels.summary: Compute the VGC sprite attribute block offset for a sprite field.

labels.label: SPRITE.ROW
labels.summary: Write one sprite bitmap row using VGC.P0..VGC.P9.

labels.label: SPRITE.SET_REG16
labels.summary: Write one 16-bit sprite attribute field.

labels.label: SPRITE.SET_REG8
labels.summary: Write one 8-bit sprite attribute field.

labels.label: SPRITE.SET_SHAPE
labels.summary: Set a sprite's shape index.

labels.label: SYS.REGA
labels.summary: Returned A register from the most recent SYS call.

labels.label: SYS.REGX
labels.summary: Returned X register from the most recent SYS call.

labels.label: SYS.REGY
labels.summary: Returned Y register from the most recent SYS call.

labels.label: TILE.ATTR
labels.summary: Set a tile attribute using TileP0..TileP3.

labels.label: TILE.BUF_FILL
labels.summary: Fill the tile command buffer.

labels.label: TILE.BUF_PUT
labels.summary: Put a tile command buffer entry.

labels.label: TILE.BUF_RANGE
labels.summary: Apply a range of tile command buffer entries.

labels.label: TILE.BUF_SET
labels.summary: Set a tile command buffer entry.

labels.label: TILE.CLS
labels.summary: Clear tile memory.

labels.label: TILE.COL
labels.summary: Copy a column of tile data from TileAddrL/H.

labels.label: TILE.COMMAND
labels.summary: Issue a raw tile engine command.

labels.label: TILE.DEF
labels.summary: Define one tile from TileP0 and TileAddrL/H.

labels.label: TILE.DEF_BULK
labels.summary: Define a run of tiles from TileP0/TileP1 and TileAddrL/H.

labels.label: TILE.FILL
labels.summary: Fill tile memory using TileP0/TileP1.

labels.label: TILE.LOAD
labels.summary: Load tile data from TileAddrL/H.

labels.label: TILE.PALETTE
labels.summary: Load tile palette data.

labels.label: TILE.PALETTE_COLOR
labels.summary: Set one tile palette colour.

labels.label: TILE.PUT
labels.summary: Put a tile using TileP0..TileP3.

labels.label: TILE.ROW
labels.summary: Copy a row of tile data from TileAddrL/H.

labels.label: TILE.SET_MIRROR
labels.summary: Set tile mirror mode from the low two bits of X.

labels.label: TILE.SET_SCROLL
labels.summary: Set tile scroll position.

labels.label: TILE.SET_SIZE
labels.summary: Select 8x8 or 16x16 tile size.

labels.label: TILE.SET_TRANS_COLOR
labels.summary: Set the tile transparent colour.

labels.label: VGC.CIRCLE
labels.summary: Issue the VGC circle/ellipse command using VGC.P0..VGC.P7.

labels.label: VGC.CLS
labels.summary: Clear the text screen through the VGC character output register.

labels.label: VGC.COMMAND
labels.summary: Issue a raw VGC command without waiting for completion.

labels.label: VGC.EXEC
labels.summary: Issue a raw VGC command and wait for completion.

labels.label: VGC.FILL
labels.summary: Issue the VGC filled rectangle command using VGC.P0..VGC.P7.

labels.label: VGC.FLASH_OFF
labels.summary: Disable flashing text.

labels.label: VGC.FLASH_ON
labels.summary: Enable flashing text.

labels.label: VGC.GCLS
labels.summary: Issue the VGC graphics clear command.

labels.label: VGC.GCOLOR
labels.summary: Issue the VGC graphics colour command using VGC.P0/P1.

labels.label: VGC.GTEXT
labels.summary: Issue the VGC graphics text command using VGC.P0..VGC.P5 and FIO.NAME.

labels.label: VGC.LINE
labels.summary: Issue the VGC line command using VGC.P0..VGC.P7.

labels.label: VGC.LOCATE
labels.summary: Set the text cursor position from VGC.P0/VGC.P1.

labels.label: VGC.MEM_READ
labels.summary: Read one byte from VGC memory using VGC.P0..VGC.P4.

labels.label: VGC.MEM_WRITE
labels.summary: Write one byte to VGC memory using VGC.P0..VGC.P4.

labels.label: VGC.PAINT
labels.summary: Issue the VGC paint command using VGC.P0..VGC.P3.

labels.label: VGC.PLOT
labels.summary: Issue the VGC plot command using VGC.P0..VGC.P3.

labels.label: VGC.RECT
labels.summary: Issue the VGC rectangle command using VGC.P0..VGC.P7.

labels.label: VGC.REVERSE
labels.summary: Enable reverse text using the current foreground/background colours.

labels.label: VGC.REVERSE_EXPLICIT

inputs.name: A
inputs.description: Packed reverse attribute, low nibble foreground and high nibble background.

labels.summary: Enable reverse text with explicit packed foreground/background colours.

labels.label: VGC.REVERSE_OFF
labels.summary: Disable reverse text.

labels.label: VGC.SET_BG
labels.summary: Set the current text background colour.

labels.label: VGC.SET_BORDER
labels.summary: Set the VGC border colour.

labels.label: VGC.SET_FG
labels.summary: Set the current text foreground colour.

labels.label: VGC.SET_FONT
labels.summary: Select the active text font slot.

labels.label: VGC.SET_MODE
labels.summary: Set the active VGC graphics/text mode.

labels.label: VGC.UNPLOT
labels.summary: Issue the VGC unplot command using VGC.P0..VGC.P3.

labels.label: VGC.VSYNC
labels.summary: Wait until the VGC frame counter advances.

labels.label: VGC.WAIT_COMMAND
labels.summary: Wait for the active VGC command to complete.

labels.label: XMC.ALLOC
labels.summary: Allocate an XRAM block using XMC_LENL/H.

labels.label: XMC.COMMAND_STATUS
labels.summary: Process XMC_CMD and return A=0 on XMC_OK, A=1 otherwise.

labels.label: XMC.DIR_OPEN
labels.summary: Open the named XRAM block directory.

labels.label: XMC.DIR_READ
labels.summary: Read the next named XRAM block directory entry.

labels.label: XMC.FETCH_RAW
labels.summary: Copy XRAM to RAM using XMC_XAL/M/H, XMC_RAML/H, and XMC_LENL/H.

labels.label: XMC.MAP_WINDOW
labels.summary: Map window X to XMC_XAL/M in the selected XMC bank.

labels.label: XMC.NAMED_DELETE
labels.summary: Delete a named XRAM block.

labels.label: XMC.NAMED_FETCH
labels.summary: Fetch a named XRAM block into RAM.

labels.label: XMC.NAMED_STASH
labels.summary: Allocate/update a named XRAM block and copy RAM into it.

labels.label: XMC.PROCESS
labels.summary: Process XMC_CMD and update XMC_STATUS/XMC_ERRCODE.

labels.label: XMC.PUT_BYTE
labels.summary: Write XMC_DATA to XMC_XAL/M/H.

labels.label: XMC.RELEASE
labels.summary: Release an XMC allocation range.

labels.label: XMC.RESET_USAGE
labels.summary: Reset XRAM usage and named allocation metadata.

labels.label: XMC.SELECT_BANK

outputs.name: A
outputs.description: 0 on success, 1 if the bank is out of range.

labels.summary: Select the current 64KB XRAM bank.

labels.label: XMC.SET_WINDOW_ADDR
labels.summary: Set a mapped window base from XMC_XAL/M and the selected XMC bank.

labels.label: XMC.STASH_RAW
labels.summary: Copy RAM to XRAM using XMC_RAML/H, XMC_XAL/M/H, and XMC_LENL/H.

labels.label: XMC.UNMAP_WINDOW
labels.summary: Disable a mapped XRAM window.

labels.label: XMC.WINDOW_BIT

outputs.name: C
outputs.description: Clear on success, set on invalid index.

labels.summary: Convert window index 0..3 to its XMC_WINCTL bit mask.

labels.label: XRAM.ADDRH
labels.summary: High byte of flat 24-bit XRAM address.

labels.label: XRAM.ADDRL
labels.summary: Low byte of flat 24-bit XRAM address.

labels.label: XRAM.ADDRM
labels.summary: Middle byte of flat 24-bit XRAM address.

labels.label: XRAM.ADDR_IN_RANGE
labels.summary: Validate XRAM_ADDRH is inside the 512KB XRAM device.

labels.label: XRAM.COPY_FROM_RAM
labels.summary: Copy CPU RAM to XRAM using the XRAM pseudo-register ABI.

labels.label: XRAM.COPY_TO_RAM
labels.summary: Copy XRAM to CPU RAM using the XRAM pseudo-register ABI.

labels.label: XRAM.DATA
labels.summary: Byte value used by XRAM read, write, and fill routines.

labels.label: XRAM.FILL
labels.summary: Fill XRAM using XRAM_ADDRL/M/H, XRAM_LENL/H, and XRAM_DATA.

labels.label: XRAM.LENH
labels.summary: High byte of XRAM transfer length.

labels.label: XRAM.LENL
labels.summary: Low byte of XRAM transfer length.

labels.label: XRAM.MAP_WINDOW3
labels.summary: Map XRAM window 3 to XRAM_ADDRM/H.

labels.label: XRAM.NAMELEN
labels.summary: Filename length for XRAM file streaming routines.

labels.label: XRAM.NAMEPTR_H
labels.summary: High byte of filename pointer for XRAM file streaming routines.

labels.label: XRAM.NAMEPTR_L
labels.summary: Low byte of filename pointer for XRAM file streaming routines.

labels.label: XRAM.RAMH
labels.summary: High byte of CPU RAM address for XRAM copy routines.

labels.label: XRAM.RAML
labels.summary: Low byte of CPU RAM address for XRAM copy routines.

labels.label: XRAM.READ8
labels.summary: Read one byte from XRAM_ADDRL/M/H into XRAM_DATA.

labels.label: XRAM.SET_ERROR
labels.summary: Set XMC-compatible XRAM error status.

labels.label: XRAM.SET_OK
labels.summary: Set XMC-compatible XRAM status to OK and return A=0.

labels.label: XRAM.WAIT_DMA
labels.summary: Wait for the shared DMA controller and map the result to XRAM status.

labels.label: XRAM.WRITE8
labels.summary: Write XRAM_DATA to XRAM_ADDRL/M/H.

labels.label: XRAM.XLOAD
labels.summary: Stream a file directly into XRAM using the XRAM pseudo-register ABI.

labels.label: XRAM.XMC_COPY_FROM_RAM
labels.summary: Copy RAM to XRAM using the XMC register ABI.

labels.label: XRAM.XMC_COPY_TO_RAM
labels.summary: Copy XRAM to RAM using the XMC register ABI.

labels.label: XRAM.XMC_FILL
labels.summary: Fill XRAM using the XMC register ABI.

labels.label: XRAM.XMC_READ8
labels.summary: Read one byte from XMC_XAL/M/H into XMC_DATA.

labels.label: XRAM.XMC_WRITE8
labels.summary: Write XMC_DATA to XMC_XAL/M/H.

labels.label: XRAM.XSAVE
labels.summary: Stream XRAM directly to a file using the XRAM pseudo-register ABI.
